title: Room Appearance — Full Implementation
summary: Replaces the applyRoomAppearance and cleanupRoomAppearance stubs with full DOM-manipulation implementations.

changes.description: Reads _roomAppearanceCache[room] and injects/updates <style id="__room_header"> for headerBg and headerTextColor overrides on .chatHeader, #roomTitle, #roomSub.
Injects/updates <style id="__room_theme"> for msgsBg (.msgs-wrap background) and inputBg (.composer background) overrides.
Adds/replaces room-theme-{roomTheme} CSS class on #chatPanel for theme-based styling hooks.
Injects/updates <style id="__room_input"> with --room-accent CSS custom property when accentColor is set.
Removes all __room_header, __room_theme, __room_uishape, __room_input style tags and strips room-theme-* classes from #chatPanel.
Destroys any room-bound particle canvases from _particleCanvases[room] (forward-compatible hook for v1.0.0.13 particle engine).
